title: 6 Sheets Gold Letter Stickers, Self-Adhesive Alphabet Stickers, Waterproof Foam Letters for Graduation Cap Decorations Scrapbooking DIY Crafts Puffy
features: 【Complete Crafting Set】This comprehensive package includes 6 sheets of 3D gold letter stickers featuring the complete alphabet from A to Z. The 1-inch puffy alphabet stickers provide sufficient quantity for multiple projects, allowing you to create personalized graduation cap decorations, scrapbook layouts, and DIY craft designs.

【Premium Material Quality】Crafted from durable PVC foam material with strong self-adhesive backing, these gold puffy letter stickers maintain their vibrant color and structural integrity over time. The waterproof properties ensure the stickers resist moisture damage, while the reliable adhesive prevents curling or lifting.

【Easy Application Process】Designed with user-friendly self-adhesive technology, these 3D foam letter stickers feature easy-peel backing that simplifies the application process. The pre-cut designs separate cleanly from the backing sheet without tearing, allowing for precise placement on graduation caps, scrapbooks, posters, and other craft surfaces without requiring additional glue or tools.

【Versatile Decorative Uses】These gold alphabet stickers serve multiple purposes across different crafting scenarios. You can utilize them for graduation cap decorations to display names and graduation years, enhance scrapbook pages with dimensional titles, personalize gift packaging with recipient names, create organizational labels for storage containers.

【Optimal Size Design】Measuring approximately 1 inch in height with consistent thickness, these puffy letter stickers offer optimal visibility while maintaining proportional spacing in word arrangements. The classic font style ensures clear readability, and the dimensional foam construction creates eye-catching shadow effects that enhance the professional appearance of your completed projects in both close-up viewing and distance displays.
description: Product description Feature: If you have an idea to decorate your boring graduation cap, These letter stickers will make it stand out! And it's three-dimensional, waterproof, and glittering in the sunlight If your friends and family like to make little crafts, these craft stickers are a great gift for them.
